# Overview — Technical Reference

*Auto-generated by docs-scanner. Do not edit manually.*

## Purpose

Documentation sites (docs.tiffanywoodyoga.com, tech.tiffanywoodyoga.com). Flask markdown renderer.

## Entry Points

- `overview/app.py` (entry_point)

## Service

- Unit: `twy-docs`
- Status: active (running)
- Port: 5005
- Command: `/usr/bin/python3`

## Dependencies

- Pip: `flask>=3.0`, `markdown>=3.5`, `pygments>=2.17`, `python-dotenv>=1.0`

## Environment Variables

- `DASHBOARD_PASS` (defined, referenced)
- `DOCS_DIR` (referenced)
- `FLASK_SECRET_KEY` (defined, referenced)
- `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` (referenced)
- `SITE_TITLE` (referenced)
- `TWY_DOCS_PORT` (referenced)

- `GET /<path:slug>`
- `GET /api/health`
- `POST /api/webhook/deploy`
